name: skynet-gc-js
description: Authoring project (dev/CI only) for the SKYNET Game Coordinator JS layer. The server runs the committed bundle under Jint; Node is never required at runtime.

scripts.build: node -e "require('node:fs').mkdirSync('../SKYNET server/GC/570/js/dist', { recursive: true })" && npm run proto:gen && npm run build:bundle
